positive: A minimalist, highly stylized forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and exotic ferns forming a central vignette. The aesthetic should be vaporwave meets enchanted forest, utilizing deep sapphire blues, neon emerald greens, and vibrant cyan highlights against deep, matte black backgrounds. The composition should feature clean, graphic silhouettes of foliage and mushrooms against the darkness, giving the print a strong, contrasting pop. Use a flat, illustrative graphic design style with clean outlines and hard edges, reminiscent of vector art, but retaining organic shape. Cinematic, high contrast, volumetric lighting from the glowing elements. Focus on symmetry and radial composition suitable for placement on a t-shirt or hoodie.
negative: blurry, deformed, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, noise, low resolution, grainy, bad anatomy, poor composition, logos, trademarks
